name: Mîr-Quorathil
personality: An iridescent dragon with @ crosshair eyes and a tiny duck hat perched at a precise 12-degree tilt, chosen algorithmically. It can bisect a regression to the exact commit in under two minutes, then wait three weeks to mention it because nobody asked.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
